taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Data Engineering, Data Engineer
core_skills: SQL Server, T-SQL, Stored procedures, Queries, Power BI
skill_match_scores: SQL Server:1.0, T-SQL:1.0, Stored procedures:0.5, Queries:1.0, Power BI:0.0
must_have_quals: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, or related field (or equivalent experience), 0–2 years of experience in software development or data-related roles, Basic to intermediate proficiency in Microsoft SQL Server (T-SQL, queries, joins, stored procedures), Experience with Power BI (report creation, dashboards, data modeling), Understanding of relational databases and data structures, Familiarity with version control systems (e.g., Git), Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail
preferred_quals: Exposure to ETL tools or data pipelines, Experience with .NET, C#, or Python, Understanding of data warehousing concepts, Familiarity with Azure services (Azure SQL, Power BI Service, etc.), Internship or project experience involving data analytics or reporting
core_responsibilities: Develop, maintain, and optimize SQL Server databases, stored procedures, and queries, Build and enhance Power BI dashboards and reports for business stakeholders, Collaborate with senior engineers and analysts to design scalable data solutions, Assist in data integration, ETL processes, and performance tuning, Troubleshoot and debug application and data-related issues, Participate in code reviews and follow best practices for software development, Document technical processes, data models, and reporting logic
job_summary: Lucid Services Group is seeking a motivated Junior Software Engineer with a strong foundation in SQL Server and Power BI. In this role, you will help design, develop, and maintain data-driven applications and reporting solutions that support business decision-making.
